attributes.title: [Oracle WebLogic OTel] Overview
attributes.description: High-level overview of Oracle WebLogic Server health covering all golden signals: latency indicators, traffic, errors, and saturation.

params.markdown:
## [Oracle WebLogic OTel] Overview

High-level health overview for Oracle WebLogic Server instances:
- Thread pool throughput and saturation
- JVM heap utilization
- JTA transaction health
- Stuck and hogging threads
- Network connectivity (open sockets)
- Server restart events

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.threadpool.throughput IS NOT NULL
| STATS throughput = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.threadpool.throughput))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.threadpool.throughput IS NOT NULL
| STATS throughput = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.threadpool.throughput))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.server.open_sockets IS NOT NULL
| STATS sockets = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.server.open_sockets))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.server.open_sockets IS NOT NULL
| STATS sockets = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.server.open_sockets))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.active IS NOT NULL
| STATS active_txn = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.jta.transactions.active))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.active IS NOT NULL
| STATS active_txn = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.jta.transactions.active))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.workmanager.threads.stuck IS NOT NULL
| STATS stuck = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.workmanager.threads.stuck))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.workmanager.threads.stuck IS NOT NULL
| STATS stuck = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.workmanager.threads.stuck))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.threadpool.requests.pending IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.threadpool.requests.pending))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.threadpool.requests.pending IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.threadpool.requests.pending))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.threadpool.threads.hogging IS NOT NULL
| STATS hogging = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.threadpool.threads.hogging))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.threadpool.threads.hogging IS NOT NULL
| STATS hogging = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.threadpool.threads.hogging))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.threadpool.threads.idle IS NOT NULL
| STATS idle = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.threadpool.threads.idle))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.threadpool.threads.idle IS NOT NULL
| STATS idle = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.threadpool.threads.idle))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.server.restarts IS NOT NULL
| STATS restarts = SUM(INCREASE(weblogic.server.restarts))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.server.restarts IS NOT NULL
| STATS restarts = SUM(INCREASE(weblogic.server.restarts))

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jvm.heap.size IS NOT NULL
| STATS heap_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.jvm.heap.size)), heap_free = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.jvm.heap.free)), heap_max = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.jvm.heap.max)) BY attributes.server
| EVAL heap_util = CASE(heap_max > 0, TO_DOUBLE(heap_size - heap_free) / TO_DOUBLE(heap_max) * 100, 0)
| STATS max_heap_util = MAX(heap_util)
| EVAL gauge_min = 0, gauge_max = 100, gauge_goal = 85

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jvm.heap.size IS NOT NULL
| STATS heap_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.jvm.heap.size)), heap_free = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.jvm.heap.free)), heap_max = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.jvm.heap.max)) BY attributes.server
| EVAL heap_util = CASE(heap_max > 0, TO_DOUBLE(heap_size - heap_free) / TO_DOUBLE(heap_max) * 100, 0)
| STATS max_heap_util = MAX(heap_util)
| EVAL gauge_min = 0, gauge_max = 100, gauge_goal = 85

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.threadpool.threads IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.threadpool.threads)), idle = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.threadpool.threads.idle)) BY attributes.server
| EVAL util = CASE(total > 0, TO_DOUBLE(total - idle) / TO_DOUBLE(total) * 100, 0)
| STATS max_util = MAX(util)
| EVAL gauge_min = 0, gauge_max = 100, gauge_goal = 85

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.threadpool.threads IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.threadpool.threads)), idle = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.threadpool.threads.idle)) BY attributes.server
| EVAL util = CASE(total > 0, TO_DOUBLE(total - idle) / TO_DOUBLE(total) * 100, 0)
| STATS max_util = MAX(util)
| EVAL gauge_min = 0, gauge_max = 100, gauge_goal = 85

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.total)), committed_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.committed))
| EVAL commit_pct = CASE(total_rate > 0, committed_rate / total_rate * 100, 100)
| EVAL gauge_min = 0, gauge_max = 100, gauge_goal = 99

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.total)), committed_rate = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.committed))
| EVAL commit_pct = CASE(total_rate > 0, committed_rate / total_rate * 100, 100)
| EVAL gauge_min = 0, gauge_max = 100, gauge_goal = 99

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.threadpool.throughput IS NOT NULL
| STATS throughput = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.threadpool.throughput)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.server
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.threadpool.throughput IS NOT NULL
| STATS throughput = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.threadpool.throughput)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.server
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.server.open_sockets IS NOT NULL
| STATS sockets = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.server.open_sockets)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.server
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.server.open_sockets IS NOT NULL
| STATS sockets = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.server.open_sockets)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.server
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.rolled_back IS NOT NULL
| STATS rolled_back = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.rolled_back)), abandoned = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.abandoned)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jta.transactions.rolled_back IS NOT NULL
| STATS rolled_back = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.rolled_back)), abandoned = SUM(RATE(weblogic.jta.transactions.abandoned)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.threadpool.threads.hogging IS NOT NULL
| STATS hogging = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.threadpool.threads.hogging)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.server
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.threadpool.threads.hogging IS NOT NULL
| STATS hogging = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.threadpool.threads.hogging)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.server
| SORT time_bucket ASC
